title: astragalus petraeus
intro: Astragalus petraeus, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, which help to enhance the body's natural response to stress and promote overall well-being. The medicinal properties of Astragalus petraeus include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fatigue, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Astragalus petraeus is often prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tincture, and is commonly consumed as a supplement in traditional Chinese medicine.
